verdict: 2026-06-26 07:30:04 PDT — Sound approach. I would satisfy the ACs with exactly this broad shape: one neutral `userData` adapter registry, `rateStore.remove` as the idempotent crypto-free file delete, split identity/rate-store middleware, and account-scoped `/api/me` data-rights routes. The implementation keeps that shape small and conventional, uses existing Express and Node primitives, adds no dependency, and does not hand-roll anything a dependency or framework feature would materially simplify. I found no approach-level concerns worth raising. I did not run `npm test && npm run build` in this read-only approach pass.
